name: Data Fetch → Validation → Slack Alert
description: Polls a data source, validates key numeric metrics against thresholds, and alerts via Slack when values are out of range.

required_secrets.description: Slack bot token with chat:write scope

replacements.config_delta: Replace CHANNEL+TEXT with TO (on-call distribution list), SUBJECT (e.g. 'Threshold Breach Alert'), BODY. Required secret: google/gmail_oauth_token instead of slack/bot_token.
Replace CHANNEL+BOT_TOKEN with TOPIC (e.g. 'alerts.validation'). Downstream consumers (PagerDuty bridge, dashboards) subscribe to the NATS subject. No alert secret needed in the module.
